ast.target: 正在加载 Review 插件 v1.6.5。

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Set Review Date
ast.target: 设置复习日期

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the heading to use for the review section. BE CAREFUL: it must be unique in each daily note.
ast.target: 设置用于复习部分的标题。请注意：它必须在每篇每日笔记中唯一。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the prefix to use on each new line. E.g., use `- ` for bullets or `- [ ] ` for tasks. **Include the trailing space.**
ast.target: 设置每行使用的前缀。例如，项目符号使用 `- `，任务使用 `- [ ] `。**包含末尾空格。**

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Review section heading
ast.target: 复盘部分标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Line prefix
ast.target: 行前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Heading prefix
ast.target: 标题前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Block review line prefix
ast.target: 块复盘行前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default review date
ast.target: 默认复盘日期

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: ## Review
ast.target: ## 复盘

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to create new file.
ast.target: 无法创建新文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The Natural Language Dates plugin was not found. The Review plugin requires the Natural Language Dates plugin. Please install it first and make sure it is enabled before using Review.
ast.target: 未找到 Natural Language Dates 插件。Review 插件需要 Natural Language Dates 插件。请先安装并确保在使用 Review 之前已启用该插件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The Natural Language Dates plugin is not available. Please make sure it is installed and enabled before trying again.
ast.target: 自然语言日期插件不可用。请确保已安装并启用后再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You've entered an invalid date (note that "two weeks" will not work, but "in two weeks" will). The note was not set for review. Please try again.
ast.target: 你输入了无效的日期（注意“two weeks”不起作用，但“in two weeks”可以）。笔记未设置为复习。请再试一次。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Add this note to a daily note for review
ast.target: 将此笔记添加到每日笔记中以供复习
